    Base for single entity-tag headers.

    Root concrete implementation of HttpHeader.
    HttpHeaderList
    A mutable, ordered list of HttpHeader instances.
    HttpIntegerHeader
    Base for integer headers.
    HttpLongHeader
    Base for long headers.
    HttpMediaRangesHeader
    Base type for headers whose wire format is an Accept-style list of media ranges.
    HttpMediaTypeHeader
    Base type for headers whose value is a single MediaType (e.g.
    HttpStringHeader
    Base type for HTTP headers whose value is an opaque string (or lazy Supplier of string).
    HttpStringRangesHeader
    Base for comma-separated tokens with optional q-values.
    HttpUriHeader
    Base for single-URI headers.
